STS2CHARTEST-HEAT_POWER.smartDescription: At 20 Heat, gain 1 [gold]Overheat[/gold]. Upon gaining [gold]Overheat[/gold], choose a powerful Overheat Card.
STS2CHARTEST-HEAT_POWER.title: Heat
STS2CHARTEST-OVERHEAT_POWER.description: Gain one of three powerful cards this combat.
STS2CHARTEST-OVERHEAT_POWER.smartDescrip: Gain one of three powerful Overheat cards for this combat.
STS2CHARTEST-OVERHEAT_POWER.title: Overheat
STS2CHARTEST-EMBERS_POWER.description: Creatures with Embers take damage equal to the stack when [gold]Blaze[/gold] is triggered and then lose half the stack.
STS2CHARTEST-EMBERS_POWER.smartDescripti: Upon triggering [gold]Blaze[/gold] takes [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage, then reduce [gold]Blaze[/gold] by half (rounded up).
STS2CHARTEST-EMBERS_POWER.title: Embers
